item.trauma.bandage.desc: Restores health when you're hurt. Hold use for ~3s.
item.trauma.tourniquet.desc: Restores a smaller amount of health. Hold use for ~2s.
item.trauma.medical.hint.self: Hold use (right-click): heal yourself when hurt.
item.trauma.medical.hint.other: Left-click another player: heal them when hurt (no melee hit).
